title: Torque Intervals
description: Max force per pedal stroke, climbing strength
purpose: Max force per pedal stroke, climbing strength

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/3. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 10:00 at 75%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 90% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/12. 90-90% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/12. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/12. 2:00 at 90%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 2:00 at 90%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 2:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 75% for 2:00. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 2:00 at 75%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The hardest part of easy rides is keeping them easy. 75%, 90-95 rpm. Stay disciplined.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 20% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/12. 2:00 at 90%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 23% complete. Rep 3/12. 90% at 90-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 90% for 2:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/12. 90% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 2:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 27% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% FTP, 90-95 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 41 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 27% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 30% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/12. 2:00 at 90%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 38% complete. Rep 5/12. 90% at 85-90 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 2:00 at 90%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 5/12. 90% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 5/12. 90% FTP, 85-90 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 42% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 42% complete. 75% FTP. Endurance pace: majority nose breathing. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 42% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 42% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 42% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 7/12. 27 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 2:00 at 90%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 7/12. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 5 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 90% for 2:00. Then 30min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 2:00 at 90%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 49% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 29 minutes of Z2 work. 85-90 rpm, Seated. Smooth, relaxed pedaling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 49% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 49% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 49% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/3. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 5:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 9/12. 61% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 9. 16min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 61% through. This is your workout. Own it. 90% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 61% done. 3 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 9. 3 to go. 21 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 64% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 19 minutes remaining. Sub-threshold aerobic work. Training fat oxidation.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 19 minutes to go. Consistency over intensity. You're doing the work that matters.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 64% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 64% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 67% done. 1 intervals left. 17 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 11 of 12. Target: 90% FTP, 85-90 rpm. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 40 minutes of work done. 17 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 11/12. 40 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 1 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 67% into session. 90%, 85-90 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 42 minutes in. Your friends are posting VO2max intervals. You're being smart.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 75% FTP, 85-90 rpm. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 2:00 at 75%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 42 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 42 minutes of Z2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 74% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 24min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 74% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 49 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 83% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 49 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 49 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 83% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
